title: MOSSEL BAY FIRE UPDATE: N2 reopens after overnight fire closure
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS: The N2 has reopened to...
bodyText:
MOSSEL BAY NEWS: The N2 has reopened to normal traffic this morning, 7 January at around 05:15 after being closed for several hours due to a large fire and ongoing firefighting operations in Aalwyndal, Island View, Vakansieplaas and surrounding areas.

The road was closed from 23:20 on Tuesday night between the Langeberg Mall off-ramp and Dana Bay, in the direction of Cape Town, due to heavy smoke and unsafe visibility conditions.

Robert Crous took this picture at Vakansieplaas on the morning of 7 January. Firefighters are still on the scene to monitor flare-ups.

Traffic was halted as a precaution to ensure public safety while emergency teams worked in the area.

Authorities confirm that the Joint Operations Centre remains activated to manage the incident and coordinate the joint response.

Previous articles:

MOSSEL BAY FIRE UPDATE: Residents safely evacuated, two firefighters injured

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
